scores.correctness_notes: The service definition is missing the required `override` field (which the gold standard explicitly calls out as required). The response also omits the `on-check-failure` mapping that links the check to the service for restart behaviour — instead using the separate `on-failure: restart` mechanism. The checks and log-targets sections are correct and well-formed.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all fields used (after, user, group, working-dir, on-failure, on-success, backoff-delay/factor/limit, level, threshold, etc.) are real Pebble layer spec fields.
